discovery.note: robots.txt has no Sitemap directive; sitemap.xml + common variants all returned HTTP 403 to curl. Fell back to homepage nav/footer link scraping via Playwright, scored URLs for brand-relevant paths (about|press|news|work|expertise|insights), hard cap 8 pages.

degrades: sitemap.xml and index variants returned HTTP 403 to curl; discovery degraded to nav-link scraping.
Content signals captured via Playwright DOM text (last-resort path): Firecrawl key not set, crawl4ai/Composio not invoked.
Logo and icons are delivered as an SVG <use> sprite; symbol geometry was resolved from the in-DOM sprite defs and saved as standalone SVG files.
contact-us was in the candidate set but not crawled — 7 brand-relevant pages gave fully saturated, stable signals before reaching the cap.
